title: Signal Industries
description:
Machines, gadgets, multiblocks, modular power suits and more!

New tech in a retro world.
body:
**This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed for now only for Better than Adventure 7.3_04, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3! *Ports to other versions may happen in the future..***

**For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page.**

# About
**Signal Industries** is a mod focused on **tech progression**, powerful **equipment with various abilities** and **machines, including multiblocks** and also includes _QoL changes_, _new monsters_, _challenges_, a _lot_ of achievements, _a new dimension to explore and **much more coming or already planned!**_

_SI is in **active development by one person** with contributions from a few others, see credits._

_Multiplayer is supported as of version 0.21.0._

_SI is currently in **Alpha**! This means that the mod is far from finished and far from being without bugs (even critical, game breaking bugs). New features get added frequently, new bugs are made and fixed every commit and such it is recommended to **backup any world where this mod is loaded frequently!!**_

# Installation
This mod needs a specific [MultiMC/Prism instance](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo) to run.

# Progression
**Progression is divided into 4 tiers:**
- **Prototype** - the humble beginnings, creating crude machines from scrap found in the world.
- **Basic** - more polished and better machines, first gadgets and equipment.
- **Reinforced** - the mid game, unlocking most of the mods features and additions, like a power suit augmentable with attachment and abilities.
- **Awakened** - the end game, with massive structures, processing lines and power capable of shaping the world around you as you see fit, also massive resource requirements.

**Achievements**, **item descriptions** and the built-in **guidebook** serve to help the player take advantage of what this mod has to offer.

# Credits
SI is developed solely by **sunsetsatellite** (that's me!) but several others have helped make this mod a reality, by creating textures, developing libraries, and providing feedback.

**Direct contributions:**
- beatrice - crystal, sword texture
- theRandomHat - plate texture
- theMidford - ideas, emotional support, icons, balancing help
- watermelonMojito - automatic miner texture
- felix170905 - connected textures code
- mzov - basic tier texture remakes

**Libraries used and recommended:**
- turnip labs - halplibe
- toufouMaster - btwaila
- useless - dragonfly

**BTA developers:**
- jonkadelic
- maggandgeez
- nebulabc
- bestsoft100

**Babric (fork of Fabric for Beta Minecraft) Maintainers:**
- calmilamsy
- 6pak

**Special thanks:**
- Better than Adventure Discord Server (biggest fork of b1.7.3 with many cool features)
- BTA Modding Discord Server (community of modding pioneers of this fork, because it was possible and nobody stopped us)
- Modification Station (discord server for retro modding)
